flashcards.back: How exact/consistent your measurements are. More decimal places = more precise.

flashcards.front: 65.347 kg or 65 kg. Which is more precise?
Can you be precise but inaccurate?
flashcards.back: Yes! A scale that always reads 70 kg when true is 75 kg is precise (consistent) but inaccurate (wrong).
Accuracy = close to true value (correctness). Precision = exact/consistent (exactness).
